data.name: Lustful Roommates
data.detailed_description:
Suzanne, Suzy to her friends, has moved in with sexy photographer Genevieve. She is sure they’ll get along well, but little does Suzy know she’s about to discover one of Geni’s best kept secrets! It’s a brand new day, and these two roomies are about to share in the first of many fuck sessions to come!

Key Features

• Visual Novel about the sexual adventures of two sexy roommates

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Ultra HD 4K (3840x2160 pixels) resolution graphics

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Girl fucked by Futanari

• Girl's and Futa's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• 20 minutes of animation with music and sounds that can be re-watched

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

Upcoming updates:

• Linux support to enjoy the game on all devices

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

• Translation into other languages ​​upon your requests, post your wishes on the game hub!

data.short_description: Suzy has just moved into a new apartment with a brand new roommate who happens to photograph women in the nude. But that’s not the best secret that Geni has been keeping! And starting on this brand new day, Suzy’s going to learn that sexy secret one way or another.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: M1
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
